name: BTC Tracker
description: A simple, privacy-focused Bitcoin investment tracker
compose:
name: slashnode-btctracker
services:
  web:
    image: thewilqq/btc-tracker:v0.7.0
    container_name: btctracker
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      NODE_ENV: production
      PORT: '3000'
      DATABASE_URL: file:/app/data/bitcoin-tracker.db
      NEXTAUTH_SECRET: ${secret.APP_SEED}
      NEXTAUTH_URL: http://${node.exports.host}:3947
    volumes:
      - web_data:/app/data
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:3947:3000
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  web_data:
    name: slashnode-btctracker_web_data
